title: athyrium delavayi
intro: Athyrium delavayi, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Athyrium delavayi include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, Athyrium delavayi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used in soups and stews, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
